nasb.text: A throne will even be established in lovingkindness, And a judge will sit on it in faithfulness in the tent of David; Moreover, he will seek justice And be prompt in righteousness.

esv.text: then a throne will be established in steadfast love, and on it will sit in faithfulness in the tent of David one who judges and seeks justice and is swift to do righteousness.”

cnv.text: 必有一個寶座在慈愛中建立； 必有一位憑信實坐在上面，就是在大衛的帳棚裡； 他必施行審判，尋求公平， 並且迅速行公義。”

ccb.text: 那时，必有一个宝座在爱中坚立， 大卫家的人必坐在上面以信实治国， 秉公审判，速行公义。

csbs.text: 必有一个宝座因慈爱坚立， 必有一位在大卫的帐篷中凭信实坐在其上， 施行审判，寻求公正，速行公义。
